name: GitHub Trending AI 每日追踪

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: llm OR ai OR agent OR mcp OR claude OR agentic stars:>5000

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ 'created:>' + new Date(Date.now() - 7*86400000).toISOString().slice(0,10) + ' (llm OR ai OR agent OR mcp OR claude OR agentic) stars:>100' }}
